title: Smart Choice Medium Faux Fur Dog Bed Brown - Fluffy Warm Pet Mattress with Fixed Cushion & High Walls - Anti-Slip Base Recycled Filling Machine Washable Faux Fur 58 × 48 × 20 cm
features: The Smart Choice Faux Fur Blanket and Mattress create a matching set that blends comfort, warmth, and sophistication, giving your pet a stylish, cosy space to relax while complementing your home décor.
Crafted from soft brown faux fur with a super-soft 180gsm velvet underside, the blanket and bed offer dual-texture luxury that stays plush and durable, providing long-term comfort wash after wash.

The blanket is perfect for sofas, pet beds, or cars, protecting furniture while adding a refined touch. The bed’s raised sides and low front entry ensure comfort and easy access for pets of all sizes and ages.
The pet mattress features soft recycled padding for sustainable comfort, with a fixed inner cushion and anti-slip base that keeps it steady while offering superior support for rest and sleep.
Both items are machine washable for effortless cleaning, maintaining their luxurious look and feel. The bed is available in Small, Medium, and Large sizes, offering a perfect fit for every breed.
description: Product Description Luxurious Comfort, Stylish Design Give your pet the comfort they deserve with our matching faux-fur beds and blankets. Ultra-soft, supportive, and fully machine washable. Available in brown or blue and sizes to suit small, medium, or large pets — stylish for your home, cosy for your pet. Comfortable Green Pet Beds Designed for Everyday Relaxation Give your pet a cosy and supportive place to rest with these green pet beds. Featuring padded high walls, a fixed cushion and an easy access front opening, they provide comfort and stability. Choose between soft sherpa fleece or durable plaid cotton twill to suit your home and your dog’s needs. Comfort They’ll Love Every Day Give your pet the perfect place to relax. Our faux fur pet beds combine soft cushioning, supportive raised sides and an easy-access front opening, helping pets of all ages feel secure and comfortable. Machine washable and made with recycled filling, they stay fresh, cosy and ready for daily use. Cosy Warmth, Everyday Comfort Keep your pet warm and comfortable with our ultra-soft faux fur blankets. Designed to protect furniture and create a cosy resting space at home or on the go, they’re lightweight, durable, and machine washable — perfect for sofas, pet beds, car seats, or travel. Find the Perfect Fit Available in Small, Medium or Large, each bed is designed to give your pet the ideal amount of space to stretch out and relax. Whether for puppies, cats or adult dogs, choose the size that suits their breed and sleeping style — same premium comfort, just the perfect fit. Two Ways to Relax – Bed or Hideaway The versatile pet cube easily transforms to suit your dog’s comfort. Push it down to create a soft, cosy bed for relaxing, or pop it up into a snug hideaway cave where pets can curl up and feel secure. Made from plush faux fur for warmth and everyday comfort.
